app.name: Saral CRM
app.tagline: Capture leads, send designs, and close on WhatsApp — in one tap.

home.title: From a jotted phone number to an organized, automated WhatsApp conversation.
home.subtitle: Capture a customer at the fair in seconds, pick the saree and dress-material designs they liked, and let the conversation continue on WhatsApp — automatically, in their own language, with your team always in sync.

capture.title: Effortless capture
capture.body: Type or dictate a messy note in any language — the app structures it into a clean lead and saves it to your Google Sheet instantly.

send.title: Pick & send designs
send.body: Choose product photos from your library and send them over WhatsApp in the customer's own language — no copy-paste, no mess.

team.title: Your team, in sync
team.body: Every lead, note, and status update is shared. A salesperson can take over any chat from the bot at any moment.

leads.newSubtitle: Capture a customer in seconds. Type or dictate a note and let AI structure it, or fill the form directly.

ai.label: Quick add with AI
ai.placeholder: Paste or dictate a note in any language — e.g. "Ramesh from Surat, wholesaler, wants saree and embroidery designs, 98765 43210"
ai.notConfigured: Add an LLM key in Settings to enable AI structuring.
ai.review: AI filled the form — review the highlighted fields before saving.

leads.nextStep: Next: pick photos to send on WhatsApp (coming soon).

catalog.title: Product catalog
catalog.subtitle: Upload your saree and dress-material designs. Select photos here to send to a customer on WhatsApp.
catalog.caption: Caption — price or design name (optional)
catalog.empty: No photos yet — upload your first design above.
catalog.sendSoon: Sending selected photos to WhatsApp arrives in the next update.

send.title: Send designs on WhatsApp
send.noPhotos: Upload photos in the Catalog first.
send.notConfigured: Connect WhatsApp in Settings to send.
send.windowNote: If the customer hasn't messaged you in 24h, WhatsApp may block free sends — ask them to message you (or scan your QR) first.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Control the system and generate your stall QR code.

eventMode.title: Event Mode
eventMode.desc: Turn the whole system on for a fair, off when it's over. When off, messages are still received but the bot stays silent and nothing auto-sends.
eventMode.halt: Emergency stop — halt all automation now

qr.title: Your stall QR code
qr.desc: Print this for your stall and add it to your website. When a customer scans it, WhatsApp opens with a message to you — opening a free 24h window to send designs.
